mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_hazard_factor WHERE hazard_type = #{hazardType} ORDER BY risk_level ASC, created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_hazard_factor WHERE hazard_type = #{hazardType}
SELECT * FROM tb_hazard_factor WHERE hazard_type = #{hazardType} AND risk_level = #{riskLevel} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_hazard_factor WHERE hazard_type = #{hazardType} AND risk_level = #{riskLevel}
SELECT * FROM tb_hazard_factor WHERE hazard_type = #{hazardType} AND factor_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_hazard_factor WHERE hazard_type = #{hazardType} AND factor_name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_hazard_factor ( hazard_type, factor_name, category, process, risk_level, measured_value, exposure_standard, assessment_method, assessment_score, cas_number, exposure_route, vaccination_status, target_group, target_count, high_risk_count, prevention_status, prevention_detail, prevention_rate, last_check_date, manager_name, manager_dept, remarks, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{hazardType}, #{factorName}, #{category}, #{process}, #{riskLevel}, #{measuredValue}, #{exposureStandard}, #{assessmentMethod}, #{assessmentScore}, #{casNumber}, #{exposureRoute}, #{vaccinationStatus}, #{targetGroup}, #{targetCount}, #{highRiskCount}, #{preventionStatus}, #{preventionDetail}, #{preventionRate}, #{lastCheckDate}, #{managerName}, #{managerDept}, #{remarks}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hazard_factor SET hazard_type = #{hazardType}, factor_name = #{factorName}, category = #{category}, process = #{process}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, measured_value = #{measuredValue}, exposure_standard = #{exposureStandard}, assessment_method = #{assessmentMethod}, assessment_score = #{assessmentScore}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, exposure_route = #{exposureRoute}, vaccination_status = #{vaccinationStatus}, target_group = #{targetGroup}, target_count = #{targetCount}, high_risk_count = #{highRiskCount}, prevention_status = #{preventionStatus}, prevention_detail = #{preventionDetail}, prevention_rate = #{preventionRate}, last_check_date = #{lastCheckDate}, manager_name = #{managerName}, manager_dept = #{managerDept}, remarks = #{remarks}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
